_meta: Phase 1 validation set for the C1-C4 construction classifier. 100 sentences. Labels: C1/C2/C3/C4 = positive for that variant; 'none' = no construction. Kill check: precision/recall >= 0.85 on C1-C3 (C4 nice-to-have). Hand-written by the Phase 1 agent on 2026-05-20.
